response.justification: While the candidate meets the minimum education and years-of-experience requirements (Bachelor's + 14 years), the resume shows no background in the required technical domain. All experience is in web/software engineering with zero evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, deep learning optimization, or hardware-software co-design—the core competencies for this principal-level role.
strengths: Meets baseline seniority requirement with 14 years of professional experience and staff/principal-level roles
Demonstrates some performance optimization mindset through low-latency systems and database optimization work
Broad technical foundation across multiple programming languages and platforms
concerns: No experience with SoC or IP modeling, which is central to the role
No background in GPU architecture, deep learning optimization, or AI accelerator design
Hardware experience (robotics, National Instruments) is dated (2014–2018) and represents a small fraction of career focused on web/software development

key_factors.factor: Years of professional experience vs. requirement
